nasb.text: And they will make their voice heard over you And will cry bitterly. They will cast dust on their heads, They will wallow in ashes.

esv.text: and shout aloud over you and cry out bitterly. They cast dust on their heads and wallow in ashes;

cnv.text: 他們必為你 放聲痛哭， 把塵土撒在自己的頭上， 在灰中打滾。

ccb.text: 为你放声痛哭， 把尘埃撒在头上， 在灰中打滚，
